records.stderr_pattern: gyp ERR!.*build error|node-gyp.*failed|`make` failed with exit code
records.description: node-gyp native addon build failure — try pre-built binaries by disabling build-from-source

reproduction.command: node -e "console.error('gyp ERR! build error\ngyp ERR! stack Error: `make` failed with exit code: 2')" 2>&1 || true

records.stderr_pattern: Could not find any Python installation|gyp ERR!.*find Python
records.description: node-gyp cannot find Python — point npm_config_python to the Python3 binary path

reproduction.command: node -e "console.error('gyp ERR! configure error\ngyp ERR! stack Error: Could not find any Python installation to use')" 2>&1 || true

records.description: Missing C/C++ compiler for native addon build — set CC/CXX env vars to available compiler

reproduction.command: node -e "console.error('gyp ERR! stack Error: not found: make\ngyp ERR! not ok')" 2>&1 || true
